creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/deskutils/mate-indicator-applet/#requiredforRun>

> There are no ports dependent upon this port

An oversight?

I imagined it being required by e.g. x11/mate or x11/mate-base. 

(I was puzzled by pkg autoremove finding libindicator after deletion of, then reinstallation of, mate.)
